content.en:
"A reincarnated person has been captured, has a secret realm been occupied by the Twelve Universe Eras?"

Ye Tian had just come out of the customs when he learned the news, and he was immediately a little surprised.

Those reincarnated ones are not easy to catch, it can be seen how much patience and energy the Lord of the Yuan Gu and others have spent to capture the reincarnated ones, and it is estimated that they have also used up a lot of treasures to catch a reincarnated person.

"The secret realm is nothing, and the reincarnated person probably uses almost all the good things in the secret realm, and the used secret realm is of little value. And there are almost no ownerless secret realms in the universe!"

Ye Tian shook his head and said.

He also wants to get a few more secret realms, but the Tibetan God Organization has a rule that one reincarnated person can occupy a maximum of two secret realms, which is for the sake of the reincarnated person, otherwise there are reincarnated people who are crazy to occupy the secret realm, what should other reincarnated people do?

Therefore, the secret technique of the reincarnation can only act on two secret realms at most, and even the compass obtained by Ye Tian can only find the location of one secret realm, and there is no way to use it again.

Because of this, he didn't waste time looking for the existence of the secret realm.

Ye Tian learned from the Terran Supreme that in addition to one reincarnated person being captured, there were also many sons of the era who fell and died.

Some of the sons of the era died on the Dominant-level Thunder Tribulation, and they all took the path of rebellion, but their strength was not good, and they underestimated the Dominant-level Thunder Tribulation, and were killed by the Thunder Tribulation.

There are also some sons of the era, Supreme Highnesses who were killed by the reincarnation, because those supreme beings of the Twelve Cosmic Era captured a reincarnated person and forcibly searched for souls to kill the reincarnated person, which angered the reincarnated person, thus attracting the reincarnation's revenge.

In short, because of the reincarnation incident, the universe was in turmoil, and many Lords and Heavenly Venerables fell and died because of it.

Of course, these are minor upheavals for the universe as a whole.

Ye Tian understood the situation a little, and then stopped paying attention.

"After 10,000 years of cultivation, I have finally cultivated the Constant Light Divine Power to the entry realm, it is worthy of being one of the three thousand Great Divine Powers, even if I meet the cultivation conditions, but it still takes so much time, if it is the first few Great Divine Powers of the Three Thousand Great Powers, wouldn't it be even more difficult to cultivate? If it is the Chaos Divine Power, the cultivation difficulty will definitely be even greater!"

Ye Tian no longer had a sense of pride at the moment.

Strictly speaking, if he didn't have the copying talent, his talent would be average, and he wouldn't grow to the point where he is now, and the help that copying talent would bring him was too great.

The introduction of the Constant Light Divine Ability, Ye Tian's initial cultivation plan can be regarded as complete, but it is very difficult to cultivate the Constant Light Divine Power to the Xiaocheng realm.

It's not a matter of resources, it's not a matter of talent, it's —

"The problem of the Dao!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The origin of the universe is too weak, it is nothing compared to the entire chaos, he knew from Hammon's memory that it is not difficult for the outside world to become a strong person of the Earth Venerable, as long as some people from small families have resources, they can cultivate to the Earth Venerable realm in tens of thousands of years, and this is impossible in the universe.

This is the power of the Great Dao in Chaos, and along with the entire chaotic cultivation system, it is easier to break through the realm, and it is also easier to cultivate supernatural powers.

But in the universe, it was too difficult, too difficult, if it weren't for Ye Tian's ability to copy, otherwise there would be no way to practice the Constant Light Divine Power.

If it was in the chaos, Ye Tian would probably have cultivated the Constant Light Divine Power to the Dacheng realm, and was even expected to cultivate to the consummation level, but in the universe, the difficulty of cultivation suddenly increased by a hundred or even a thousand times.

It is so difficult to cultivate in the universe, but there is one advantage, that is, it is much safer.

If it is in chaos, let alone the Earth Venerable, if the weak Heavenly Destiny Realm has no backer, it may die at the hands of other strong people at any time, chaos is a place full of endless crises, but there are countless opportunities.

"It's time to go out and try the speed of the Constant Light Divine Power!"

Ye Tian stepped out and left the Holy City.

Immediately, he used his constant light power to return to Earth.

Shout!

Ye Tian's body turned into a ray of light and instantly passed through the endless void, and the next moment he came to the earth.

"It's !! so fast"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply, and he was really shocked by the constant light supernatural power.

The Constant Light Divine Power that is only an entry level is many times faster than the speed of those Perfection Realms in the universe, which is the speed that the absolute master level can have.

"The speed of the second-class supreme is definitely not comparable to me, and even some first-class supremes who are not good at speed are far inferior to my speed!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

At this moment, he really had the confidence to face the first-class supreme.

Of course, even if Ye Tian had the confidence to face a first-class supreme, he would not really go to trouble the first-class supreme, he was not an opponent of the first-class supreme, so he could only barely escape.

Shout!

Ye Tian returned to the Holy City from the earth, and immediately came to the Source Beast Pavilion of the Heavenly Pavilion.

The Source Beast Pavilion is a newly established attic that houses the Origin Ancestor cub Xiao Yuanyuan.

As soon as he entered the Source Beast Pavilion, Ye Tian saw Xiao Yuanyuan, the size of a small mountain, sitting there, constantly eating all kinds of delicacies, which were all honored by the disciples of the Heavenly Pavilion.

"Master!"

When Xiao Yuanyuan saw Ye Tian, he approached with excitement.

"That's right, I haven't slackened my cultivation yet!"

Ye Tian nodded with satisfaction.

Now Xiao Yuanyuan's cultivation is not low, it is already in the realm of the cosmic gods, and its physical body is even more terrifying, it is already comparable to the ultimate powerhouse.

In other words, Xiao Yuanyuan's current combat power is almost the ultimate in dominance, and it is not even weaker than some weaker Tianzun in the slightest.

This is the result of the combination of the way of the physical body and the way of the cultivation of the divine power of the universe, but it is a pity that Xiao Yuanyuan's talent in the cultivation of divine power is average, even if there are countless resources piled up, now he has only cultivated to the realm of the universe god.

But Ye Tian believes that as long as Xiao Yuanyuan is given time, the day when Xiao Yuanyuan will achieve the supreme is not far away, this is the benefit of a strong bloodline.

However, if you want Madoka to grow to the level of protecting the human race, it is not something that can be done in a short time.

Ye Tian played with Xiao Yuanyuan for a while, gave Xiao Yuanyuan some good things, and left here.

......

Heavenly Pavilion.

Ye Tian held all kinds of materials in his hands, and these resources were all kinds of secrets and legends in the universe.

His current strength has reached a shackle, but he is not willing to break through to Tianzun like this, he still wants to continue to accumulate, and his Chaos Golden Desolate Recipe is only at the eighth layer of the Dacheng realm, and he also wants to cultivate the eighth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Recipe to the consummation realm.

So, he must continue to accumulate.

However, the resources in his hands are not enough to support him to continue to improve, so he wants to find more opportunities, and these secrets and legends may be able to help him continue to break through.
